<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<bpmn:definitions xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xmlns:bpmn="http://www.omg.org/spec/BPMN/20100524/MODEL" xmlns:bpmndi="http://www.omg.org/spec/BPMN/20100524/DI" xmlns:dc="http://www.omg.org/spec/DD/20100524/DC" xmlns:di="http://www.omg.org/spec/DD/20100524/DI" xmlns:pm="http://processmaker.com/BPMN/2.0/Schema.xsd" xmlns:tns="http://sourceforge.net/bpmn/definitions/_1530553328908" xmlns:xsd="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" targetNamespace="http://bpmn.io/schema/bpmn" exporter="ProcessMaker Modeler" exporterVersion="1.0" xsi:schemaLocation="http://www.omg.org/spec/BPMN/20100524/MODEL http://bpmn.sourceforge.net/schemas/BPMN20.xsd">
  <bpmn:process id="ProcessId" name="ProcessName" isExecutable="true">
    <bpmn:laneSet id="node_2">
      <bpmn:lane id="node_3" name="Approver">
        <bpmn:flowNodeRef>node_12</bpmn:flowNodeRef>
        <bpmn:flowNodeRef>node_16</bpmn:flowNodeRef>

      </bpmn:lane>
      <bpmn:lane id="node_5" name="Requestor">

      </bpmn:lane>
    </bpmn:laneSet>
    <bpmn:startEvent id="node_6" name="Start Event" pm:allowInterstitial="false" pm:config="{"web_entry":null}">
      <bpmn:outgoing>node_43</bpmn:outgoing>
    </bpmn:startEvent>
    <bpmn:task id="node_7" name="Accomplish Request for Payment Form" pm:allowInterstitial="false" pm:assignment="requester" pm:assignmentLock="false" pm:allowReassignment="false" pm:config="{"reactions":false,"voting":false,"edit_comments":false,"remove_comments":false,"web_entry":null,"email_notifications":{"notifications":[]}}">
      <bpmn:incoming>node_45</bpmn:incoming>
      <bpmn:incoming>node_24</bpmn:incoming>
      <bpmn:outgoing>node_47</bpmn:outgoing>
    </bpmn:task>
    <bpmn:scriptTask id="node_9" name="Retrieve Requestor Information" pm:scriptRef="">
      <bpmn:incoming>node_43</bpmn:incoming>
      <bpmn:outgoing>node_45</bpmn:outgoing>
    </bpmn:scriptTask>
    <bpmn:scriptTask id="node_11" name="Get Next Approver" pm:scriptRef="">
      <bpmn:incoming>node_47</bpmn:incoming>
      <bpmn:outgoing>node_14</bpmn:outgoing>
    </bpmn:scriptTask>
    <bpmn:task id="node_12" name="Review RFP Requests" pm:allowInterstitial="false" pm:assignment="user_by_id" pm:assignmentLock="false" pm:allowReassignment="false" pm:config="{"reactions":false,"voting":false,"edit_comments":false,"remove_comments":false,"web_entry":null,"email_notifications":{"notifications":[]}}">
      <bpmn:incoming>node_35</bpmn:incoming>

    </bpmn:task>

      <bpmn:incoming>node_53</bpmn:incoming>
      <bpmn:outgoing>node_10</bpmn:outgoing>
    </bpmn:scriptTask>
    <bpmn:serviceTask id="node_16" name="Inform Approver of Pending Approvals" pm:config="{"type":"text","subject":"You have a Pending Request for your Approval","textBody":"Hi,\n\nYou have a pending request awaiting your approval.\n\n{{number}}\n\nApproval Link: {{request_link}}\n\nThank you!\n\nBest Regards,\n\nThe BPMS Team","screenRef":null,"users":[],"groups":[],"addEmails":["elizabeth.tan@dlsu.edu.ph"],"requestRecipients":[]}" implementation="connector-send-email/processmaker-communication-email-send">
      <bpmn:incoming>node_57</bpmn:incoming>
      <bpmn:incoming>node_25</bpmn:incoming>
      <bpmn:outgoing>node_35</bpmn:outgoing>

    </bpmn:scriptTask>

    </bpmn:scriptTask>
    <bpmn:serviceTask id="node_19" name="Inform Requestor of Rejected RFP" pm:config="{"type":"text","subject":"Rejected RFP: {{number}}","textBody":"Hi,\n\nThis is to inform you that the {{number}} has been rejected by the approver.\n\nRequest Link: {{request_link}}\n\nBest regards,\nThe BPMS Team","screenRef":null,"users":[],"groups":[],"addEmails":["elizabeth.tan@dlsu.edu.ph"],"requestRecipients":[]}" implementation="connector-send-email/processmaker-communication-email-send">
      <bpmn:incoming>node_29</bpmn:incoming>
      <bpmn:outgoing>node_26</bpmn:outgoing>
    </bpmn:serviceTask>

    <bpmn:endEvent id="node_21" name="End Event">
      <bpmn:incoming>node_23</bpmn:incoming>
    </bpmn:endEvent>
    <bpmn:sequenceFlow id="node_23" name="" sourceRef="node_18" targetRef="node_21"/>
    <bpmn:sequenceFlow id="node_26" name="" sourceRef="node_19" targetRef="node_20"/>
    <bpmn:exclusiveGateway id="node_27" name="Exclusive Gateway">
      <bpmn:incoming>node_33</bpmn:incoming>
      <bpmn:outgoing>node_29</bpmn:outgoing>
      <bpmn:outgoing>node_31</bpmn:outgoing>
      <bpmn:outgoing>node_41</bpmn:outgoing>
      <bpmn:outgoing>node_53</bpmn:outgoing>
    </bpmn:exclusiveGateway>
    <bpmn:sequenceFlow id="node_29" name="Rejected" sourceRef="node_27" targetRef="node_19">
      <bpmn:conditionExpression xsi:type="bpmn:tFormalExpression">approval == 3</bpmn:conditionExpression>
    </bpmn:sequenceFlow>
    <bpmn:sequenceFlow id="node_31" name="Approved" sourceRef="node_27" targetRef="node_18">
      <bpmn:conditionExpression xsi:type="bpmn:tFormalExpression">until_level_number == level_number and approval == 1</bpmn:conditionExpression>
    </bpmn:sequenceFlow>
    <bpmn:sequenceFlow id="node_33" name="" sourceRef="node_12" targetRef="node_27"/>
    <bpmn:sequenceFlow id="node_35" name="" sourceRef="node_16" targetRef="node_12"/>
    <bpmn:sequenceFlow id="node_41" name="For Next Approval" sourceRef="node_27" targetRef="node_17">
      <bpmn:conditionExpression xsi:type="bpmn:tFormalExpression">level_number < until_level_number and approval == 1</bpmn:conditionExpression>
    </bpmn:sequenceFlow>
    <bpmn:sequenceFlow id="node_43" name="" sourceRef="node_6" targetRef="node_9"/>
    <bpmn:sequenceFlow id="node_45" name="" sourceRef="node_9" targetRef="node_7"/>
    <bpmn:sequenceFlow id="node_47" name="" sourceRef="node_7" targetRef="node_11"/>
    <bpmn:sequenceFlow id="node_53" name="Request For More Information" sourceRef="node_27" targetRef="node_15">
      <bpmn:conditionExpression xsi:type="bpmn:tFormalExpression">approval == 2</bpmn:conditionExpression>
    </bpmn:sequenceFlow>
    <bpmn:sequenceFlow id="node_57" name="" sourceRef="node_17" targetRef="node_16"/>
    <bpmn:serviceTask id="node_4" name="Inform Requestor of Error" pm:config="{"type":"text","subject":"{{subject_header}}","textBody":"Hi,\n\n{{email_error_message}}\n\nThank you.\n\nBest regards,\nThe BPMS Team","screenRef":null,"users":[],"groups":[],"addEmails":[],"requestRecipients":[{"type":"requester","value":null}]}" implementation="connector-send-email/processmaker-communication-email-send">

    <bpmn:sequenceFlow id="node_10" name="" sourceRef="node_15" targetRef="node_4"/>

    <bpmn:exclusiveGateway id="node_8" name="No Error?">
      <bpmn:incoming>node_14</bpmn:incoming>
      <bpmn:outgoing>node_25</bpmn:outgoing>
      <bpmn:outgoing>node_30</bpmn:outgoing>
    </bpmn:exclusiveGateway>
    <bpmn:sequenceFlow id="node_14" name="" sourceRef="node_11" targetRef="node_8"/>
    <bpmn:sequenceFlow id="node_25" name="No Error" sourceRef="node_8" targetRef="node_16">
      <bpmn:conditionExpression xsi:type="bpmn:tFormalExpression">no_error == 1</bpmn:conditionExpression>
    </bpmn:sequenceFlow>
    <bpmn:sequenceFlow id="node_30" name="With Error" sourceRef="node_8" targetRef="node_4">
      <bpmn:conditionExpression xsi:type="bpmn:tFormalExpression">no_error == 0</bpmn:conditionExpression>
    </bpmn:sequenceFlow>
